title: Electrician for industry
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: several years of experience in electrical installations
careful and responsible approach to work
We especially value professional pride, a safe way of working and a firm approach to work.
what_we_offer: the opportunity to work in different types of locations
the support of a professional organization
The works will start according to the agreement and continue until the end of the year.
jobcontent:
We are looking for electricians for our client in South Karelia

We are looking for experienced electricians for our client in the South Karelia region for temporary employment for the rest of the year.

Our client company works with building technology and industry and performs versatile electrical installation and maintenance tasks in various locations.

Job description

The work includes electrical installations and maintenance tasks in various locations, such as commercial, industrial and public buildings.

The work is independent and requires the ability to handle installation work professionally from start to finish. You work at customer sites where you are responsible for the high-quality implementation of the work.

Who are we looking for?

We are looking for experienced experts in the electrical field who have:
- electrical education
- several years of experience in electrical installations
- valid electrical qualifications and cards
- ability to work independently
- careful and responsible approach to work
- B driver's license
We especially value professional pride, a safe way of working and a firm approach to work.

 What we offer

- versatile and demanding tasks
- the opportunity to work in different types of locations
- the support of a professional organization
- competitive salary

The works will start according to the agreement and continue until the end of the year.

Were you interested? Send your application at eezy.fi and tell us briefly about your experience, we will go over together whether this could be a suitable next step for you.

Eezy helps its customers succeed by quickly providing the best experts for changing situations nationwide. Personnel leasing, recruitment, light entrepreneurship and our other expert services in working life offer the most versatile ways to meet work and people.
We want to build a diverse and equal Eezy. We welcome applications from qualified applicants from all kinds of backgrounds. We always follow an equal and transparent recruitment process. We believe that diversity is not only an asset of our corporate culture, but also a source of the best results.

title: Project manager / business expert
what_we_expect: The position is located in Ylivieska, and you will work in close cooperation with companies and operators in both regions, being responsible for the practical implementation of the project in the regions.

In your work, you contact companies smoothly and move actively in the business field. You get to help SMEs in the region in the early stages of internationalization with the help of concrete tools, workshops and company-specific sparring sessions.
you are responsible for the main implementation of the project in Ylivieska and you are responsible for managing and coordinating the project
tendering for the purchase services of the project
activation and contacting companies for project measures
practical planning and implementation of workshops, trainings and events
sparring of companies in the early stages of internationalization
what_we_offer: the opportunity to work directly on the growth and internationalization of companies
versatile and practical task in the area of the city of Ylivieska
a wide cooperation network (companies, experts, developer organizations)
the opportunity to influence the vitality of the region and the growth of companies
a competent and encouraging work community
the benefits of a stable employer in the city of Ylivieska
The salary for the position is determined according to KVTES. The position is temporary and there is a 6-month trial period.
jobcontent:
We are looking for an inspiring and development-oriented person to join the business services of the city of Ylivieska

PROJECT MANAGER / COMPANY EXPERT

for a fixed-term employment starting on August 1, 2026 (or according to the agreement) to implement the Ylivieska city's share in the Get Your Wings - Internationalization incentive for smaller companies project. The project is for two years. The main implementer of the project is Ylivieska city's life force services, and the partners are Kalajoki Region Business Center and Raahe Region Development. 

The position is located in Ylivieska, and you will work in close cooperation with companies and operators in both regions, being responsible for the practical implementation of the project in the regions.

In your work, you contact companies smoothly and move actively in the business field. You get to help SMEs in the region in the early stages of internationalization with the help of concrete tools, workshops and company-specific sparring sessions.

As a project manager/company expert, you support the everyday life of companies and lower their threshold to enter the international market. The goal of the project is to increase companies' understanding of international business and initiate new internationalization measures in the region. You work in close cooperation with companies, experts and developer organizations.

Key tasks
you are responsible for the main implementation of the project in Ylivieska and you are responsible for managing and coordinating the project
tendering for the purchase services of the project 
activation and contacting companies for project measures
practical planning and implementation of workshops, trainings and events 
sparring of companies in the early stages of internationalization 
cooperation with experts and partners 
implementing the project's communication and reporting and documenting the results

We require from the applicant
·experience or know-how in companies' international business and export
·applicable degree
·good communication, interaction and networking skills
·active and self-initiated approach to work

We look forward to it
· an understanding of micro and SME business operations
·experience in project work or business financing (e.g. export financing and business subsidies)
·experience in business or regional development
·ability to implement trainings, facilitate workshops and guide companies in a practical way

We offer
the opportunity to work directly on the growth and internationalization of companies 
versatile and practical task in the area of the city of Ylivieska
a wide cooperation network (companies, experts, developer organizations) 
the opportunity to influence the vitality of the region and the growth of companies
a competent and encouraging work community 
the benefits of a stable employer in the city of Ylivieska 

The salary for the position is determined according to KVTES. The position is temporary and there is a 6-month trial period.

We ask those applying for a job position to also consider the vacant project coordinator/business expert position of Kalajoki business services in the same project. You can apply for a position in both locations, but you must submit your own application in both. Applicants for both positions can be interviewed together.

Ylivieska is a growing and developing city of 15,300 inhabitants. The city of Kasvu, located in the middle of the expanses of Ostrobothnia, is a lively and youthful miracle worker. Ylivieska is a bigger center of commerce and services in an area of ​​about 80,000 inhabitants.

Marjaana Haapakoski, vitality director, tel. 044 4294 611

title: Maintenance specialist, relay protection
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent: At Helen, we are renewing ourselves vigorously and constantly developing cleaner and more environmentally friendly ways of producing energy. We want to lead the energy revolution as a trend setter for the green transition and offer new regional and renewable energy solutions that are increasingly better suited to our customers' needs. New innovations are part of our everyday life, and they are born in cooperation with our customers. At Helen Sähköverko, we ensure a smooth everyday life for the people of Helsinki. Our electricity grid is the most reliable in Europe: a Helsinki resident experiences a half-hour power cut on average only every ten years. We maintain and develop Helsinki's nearly 6,500 km electricity network efficiently. Helen Sähköverkko is facing an unprecedented challenge as the clean transition doubles Helsinki's electricity consumption. A clean transition and the development of the city can also be seen in the significant growth of our investment program. Enabling growth requires moving to a 400 kV voltage level in our region's electricity transmission, which creates a completely new challenge for the development of the electricity network. Helen Sähköverkko is part of the Helen Group, which in addition to heat, cooling and electricity offers new solutions for regional and renewable energy, smart real estate and electric transport that are increasingly better suited to our customers' needs. In order to achieve our ambitious goals in enabling a clean transition and to serve our customers even better, we are now looking for a solution-seeking and development-minded maintenance expert who is an iron professional in electrical network relay protection and secondary systems to join us for a permanent employment relationship. As a maintenance expert specializing in relay protection and secondary systems, you are responsible for the definition, maintenance and development of the relay protection of the electrical network, and you analyze the operation of the relay protection after disturbances. You also participate as a representative of the customer organization in the daily maintenance activities, planning, procurement and implementation phases of substation projects and, if necessary, support the operation center in challenging disruption situations. We expect you to have extensive and in-depth knowledge of relay protection of the electrical network (400 kV, 110 kV and kj), while you are familiar with the definition and calculation of relay values ​​from your previous work career. We also hope for experience with substation secondary system components, including protective relays and substation automation. You need excellent cooperation and communication skills in the task while working closely with different stakeholders such as maintenance partners, equipment manufacturers, network companies and customers. We also value experience with network calculation and reporting software and enterprise resource planning systems. We expect you to have a university degree suitable for the position and several years of experience working in a substation environment and defining relay values. We are on a journey of change. We are not satisfied with the way we do things now, we raise the bar ourselves - constantly. We want to be even braver and more agile, and that's why we pay special attention to these qualities when recruiting. We cannot succeed without cooperation, and we work closely with both internal stakeholders and external partners. We are looking for people who dare to take ownership and who challenge, question and try new things - doing it skillfully and constructively. We offer you a central role in the development of our capital's electricity distribution network. As a maintenance specialist, you work as part of the Maintenance Group, where you get to work with top professionals in the field. We actively develop our own expertise, we offer the opportunity to participate in industry trainings, we learn from each other and we are happy to share our own views with others as well. In your position, you have flexible working hours and, of course, the opportunity to work remotely or at the office, which is located in Ruohollande WeLand. Come and make a greener future with us! Is there anything left to think about? You can ask your future supervisor Tuomas Murumäi (tel. 050 363 5043/ tuomas.murumaki@helen.fi) for more information about working with us or the task. Did our energies meet? Awesome! You can easily send your application and resume via our recruitment system (helen.fi/rekry), no later than Sun 3 May 2026. Please note that we process applications and proceed with the recruitment of a suitable person already during the application period, so please act quickly. Hope to hear from you soon! Let's join forces!

title: Senior Finance Business Analyst
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent: At Helen, we offer an easier and more uncomplicated everyday life for around 600,000 customers in Finland. In addition to electricity, heat and cooling, we offer solutions for regional and renewable energy and electric transport. We are developing a smarter and cleaner energy system, with which we make sure that our customers can produce, use and save energy while respecting the environment. We systematically reduce our emissions and our goal is to break away from combustion-based energy production by 2040. Come and build the future of clean and flexible energy. We are looking for an experienced and analytical Senior Finance Business Analyst to strengthen Helen Group's financial reporting, analytics and knowledge management. In your role You are responsible for the development of group-level financial reporting, analytics and the financial data model, and you ensure their functionality in strategic guidance, forecasting and decision-making. that business reports are based on common, agreed financial figures. You design and develop financial reports, dashboards and dashboards (Power BI) for the needs of different stakeholders and act as an expert in questions related to the interpretation and use of financial figures. You are responsible for ensuring that reporting, BI and analytics solutions are used in the economy appropriately and in accordance with best practices, and you identify opportunities to develop them, e.g. automation and AI solutions You act as an experienced business sparring partner and bring financial insight to, for example, profitability development, investment evaluation, budgeting and forecasting. You work closely with finance, IT and business operations, ensuring that reporting and analytics solutions support the group's overall management. We expect you to have at least 5-7 years of experience in financial analytics, reporting, data modeling or working with financial forecasting models. Strong knowledge of financial data, dimensions and key figures, as well as the ability to visualize broad entities. Experience with data analytics and reporting tools (e.g. Power BI, SQL, Python, Databricks). Ability to build clear, user-friendly and visually functional dashboards. Ability to change complex financial information into an understandable and decision-making entity. Strong cooperation and communication skills and the ability to act as a credible sparring partner, even for non-financial stakeholders. Interest in the development of financial processes, systems and technologies, as well as self-initiative and development-seeking attitude. You know how to challenge, spar and guide, and you ensure that financial information is correctly used, consistent and relevant for decision-making. You stay on the edge of development and use new technologies and AI solutions without prejudice as part of the continuous development of financial reporting and analytics, for example in support of forecasting, identifying deviations and enhancing reporting processes. We offer you a central and influential role in the development of the entire group's financial visibility and guidance. Your work has a direct impact on how financial information is used in decision-making at different levels of the organization. You get to work in a competent, relaxed and cooperative community of experts, where your point of view is valued and you are given room to develop and influence. At the same time, you are involved in building the future of clean and sustainable energy. You also get to enjoy our various employee benefits, such as employee electricity, a charity work day, the possibility of remote work abroad and a welfare benefit. Our office is located in Ruoholahti's We Land, and we work flexibly with a hybrid model. The salary for the position is determined based on the demands of the position and your skills and experience. You can ask your future supervisor Sami Rautiaiin (050 535 4499 / firstname.surname@helen.fi) for more information about working with us or the task. He is (best) reachable by phone on Thursday 16.4 at 15-16, Wed 22.4 at 9-10 and Mon 27.4 at 14-15. Were you interested? Awesome! You can apply through our recruitment system no later than May 4, 2026. Please note that we process applications already during the application period. Hope to hear from you soon!
